phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso della Basilica, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del-la bah-ZEE-lee-kah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare foto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see POSS-oh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Palazzo Reale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel pa-LAT-soh reh-AH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: It is here, on the square.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the Palazzo Reale opens
phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre il Palazzo Reale?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh eel pah-LAHT-tsoh reh-AH-leh?

responses.english: At nine, except Tuesday when it's closed.
responses.phonetic: AL-leh NOH-veh, TRAN-neh eel mar-TEH-dee keh eh KYOO-zoh.
responses.french: Alle nove, tranne il martedì che è chiuso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the square hosts events
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si svolgono eventi in piazza?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see SVOL-goh-noh eh-VEN-tee een PYAHT-tsah?

responses.english: Yes, concerts and festivals throughout the year.
responses.phonetic: see, kon-CHER-tee eh FES-teh doo-RAN-teh TOOT-toh LAN-noh.
responses.french: Sì, concerti e feste durante tutto l'anno.
